title: Authors and Citation
text: Tasan M (2024). murlib.data: Data Utilities. R package version 1.1.0.

title: Format a time or date to an ISO8601 string. — iso8601
code: iso8601(   x,   what = c("datetime", "timestamp", "date", "time"),   tz = "",   tz_offset = TRUE,   digits = 0 )

title: Format a time or date to an ISO8601 string. — iso8601
text: x Date POSIXt time vector. string type output? "datetime" "timestamp" equivalent, "date" just date, "time" just time (.e. without date). tz Olson timezone string desired timezone output string presentation; base:strftime(). default (empty string) uses R's current session-set timezone. (NULL treated identically empty string.) tz_offset boolean timezone offset included output? digits integer Subsecond digits desired output string, specified "\ ISO8601 character vector.   Format time date ISO8601 string.

title: murlib.data: Data Utilities — murlib.data-package
text: collection utilities solve common data problems.
